steps.title: Identify the subject and verb need
steps.content:
The subject is 'The word robot', which is singular.
The blank needs a verb to complete the sentence.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Choice C uses 'was', the singular past tense of 'be', matching the singular subject.
Choices A, B, and D use plural or progressive forms that do not agree with the singular subject.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
